name: monte-sinai-platform
description: Monorepo Monte Sinai com site oficial Next e painel administrativo Next.

scripts.lint: npm --workspace @monte-sinai/admin run lint && npm --workspace @monte-sinai/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @monte-sinai/admin run typecheck && npm --workspace @monte-sinai/web run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --workspace @monte-sinai/admin run build && npm --workspace @monte-sinai/web run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @monte-sinai/admin run test && npm --workspace @monte-sinai/web run test
scripts.ready: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
